tagline: Welcome to Quinta Refúgio Abreu, a retreat that combines charm and modernity in the Minho region. Located in Delães, Famalicão, this quinta stands out…
description:
Welcome to Quinta Refúgio Abreu, a retreat that combines charm and modernity in the Minho region. Located in Delães, Famalicão, this quinta stands out with its spacious areas, natural lighting, luxury furnishings, outdoor pool, tennis court, gym, and inviting reception rooms. It is ideal for families and groups seeking comfort and unforgettable experiences.

Quinta Refúgio Abreu features 5 bedrooms, of which 3 are suites, accommodating up to 10 guests in complete comfort. Each room has been carefully decorated. Spanning a total area of 584 m², the quinta impresses with generous spaces, high ceilings, abundant natural light, and sophisticated decor, complemented by a fireplace that provides cozy warmth on chilly days.

The property boasts two kitchens: the main one, equipped with high-quality furnishings, and a regional-style kitchen located outdoors, perfect for authentic culinary experiences. Additionally, there is an elegant games room with a spacious veranda.

Outside, an expansive green garden features a large pool, sun loungers, a terrace with outdoor sofas, and a complete barbecue kit for al fresco dining. There is also a tennis court and a gym for moments of physical activity.

Quinta Refúgio Abreu, located in Delães, Vila Nova de Famalicão, is a remarkable example of modern Portuguese architecture, designed by architect Mário Abreu in 1958. Recently renovated, the property has maintained its original character and harmony with its surroundings. This project received the Januário Godinho Award from the Municipality of Famalicão in recognition of its architectural heritage preservation.

In addition to being an enchanting retreat, the quinta is fully structured for events, offering versatile and well-equipped spaces for special occasions. It stands out for its seamless integration with the surrounding landscape, environmental sustainability, and the extension of the building’s lifespan, reflecting Mário Abreu’s innovative vision.

Nestled in the Delães region of Vila Nova de Famalicão, Abreu Retreat Palace is set in an area filled with nature and green spaces, ideal for those seeking tranquility in the heart of Minho. Here, the countryside blends with modernity, offering the perfect space to relax and explore local culture.

In the surroundings, you’ll find verdant hills and vast fields, perfect for hiking, cycling, and horseback riding. The proximity to traditional villages and local markets allows visitors to experience the region’s traditions and typical cuisine.

Just a few kilometers away, the centre of Vila Nova de Famalicão offers museums, historic monuments, and restaurants serving authentic Portuguese dishes. The area around Abreu Retreat Palace is the perfect starting point to enjoy moments of peace, beauty, and tradition.

Guests have exclusive access to all indoor and outdoor amenities. The concierge service is available 24 hours a day to organize excursions, private chef bookings, and other services. To ensure availability, please request any extras at least 72 hours in advance.

Important Note:
During your stay, regular garden and pool maintenance may take place. These interventions are important to ensure that all equipment remains clean, functional, and safe to use.
During the high season (May to October), the pool is regularly maintained to ensure an impeccable experience for guests. In the low season (November to April), the pool may be closed, subject to confirmation with our team.

To reach Quinta Refúgio Abreu by public transport, take the train to Caminha station, which is located about 5 km from the property. From there, catch a taxi or local bus to Delães. If you are coming from Braga or Porto, there are train connections for this route.

name: Alentejo Rural Farmhouse with Pool and Total Privacy
tagline: A peaceful retreat in the heart of the Alentejo. Traditional quinta with 4 bedrooms, heated pool, dark wood rural kitchen and unlimited green space. J…
description:
A peaceful retreat in the heart of the Alentejo. Traditional quinta with 4 bedrooms, heated pool, dark wood rural kitchen and unlimited green space. Just 30km from Monsaraz and wild trails. Private parking and easy transport access. Perfect for families, groups and those seeking authentic rural escape.

Nestled in the reddish lands of the Alentejo, Monte do Sossego is a haven of peace where time slows down. This traditional quinta, with its characteristic white façade and terracotta tiles, welcomes up to 8 guests in 4 cozy bedrooms. The dark wood rural kitchen with beamed ceilings invites sharing home-cooked meals, while the brick-arched living room is the social heart. The outdoor pool, surrounded by century-old cork oaks, is your private vantage point to enjoy endless Alentejo days. Every detail honors local Alentejo architecture.

At your doorstep lie rural trails between ancient olive groves and earth paths that tell stories of centuries. Monsaraz, the medieval village perched above Alqueva Lake, is just 30km away and invites you to explore cobbled streets, sip wine by the water and immerse yourself in history. Moura and Serpa, historic towns with vibrant Saturday markets, beckon you to discover local gastronomy and ancestral traditions. The Alqueva Lake, Pulo do Lobo and Ribeira de Odivelas offer wild corners for unexpected swims and outdoor adventures.

Monte do Sossego sits just 30km from Monsaraz and Moura, well-served by main roads. The property offers generous private parking for multiple vehicles. Car rental is essential for exploring the region, with several options in Moura (5km). Public transport (buses) connects the area to Ferreira do Alentejo (15km) and Beja (45km). Walking trails and footpaths lead you through local paths and neighboring villages.

For those wanting more than contemplation, Portugal Active brings adventure to your door. Walk the secret trails of the Alentejo with a local guide, uncover ruins and forgotten stories of peoples and past eras. Just 30km away, Alqueva Lake opens up for stand-up paddle among golden cliffs. E-MTB rides through rural paths combine adrenaline with pristine scenery. Each experience is designed to deepen your connection with this wild, authentic Alentejo.

description:
Calejo House – Pool & Sports & Grill Retreat is a luxury hideaway in the lush heart of Nogueira.
With five bedrooms, swimming pools for adults and children, a sports court, and an exclusive basement with a billiards room and wine cellar, this home is the perfect retreat for families, groups, or private getaways.
It’s a space where comfort, privacy, and nature meet with elegance.

Calejo House – Pool & Sports & Grill Retreat is much more than a holiday home — it's a true sanctuary where comfort, leisure, and exclusivity come together to create truly unforgettable moments.

Upon entering, you're welcomed by a warm entrance hall that provides smooth access to the different areas of the house. On the left, you’ll find a functional, fully equipped kitchen with a guest WC — perfect for shared culinary moments with family or friends. On the right, the simple yet comfortable living room invites you to relax and enjoy laid-back time together. Also on this floor is a more private area with two bedrooms (one with an en-suite bathroom and shower) and a shared bathroom — ideal for those who prefer to avoid stairs.

Upstairs, two additional bedrooms benefit from natural light and views of the surrounding area, complemented by a shared bathroom — perfect for comfortably hosting larger families or groups.

The basement is a true leisure and charm area: a billiards room for lively games and an impressive wine cellar that can hold around 1,000 bottles — an exclusive feature that is sure to delight wine lovers.

The property also includes a cosy mini apartment with an independent entrance, fully integrated into the house’s dynamic. This self-contained space, with a double bedroom, bathroom with shower, and kitchen, is ideal for couples, relatives, or guests who value autonomy and privacy during their stay.

But it’s outdoors where Calejo House truly shines. Surrounded by a manicured garden, the house offers multiple seating and dining areas, equipped with comfortable furniture — perfect for long afternoons of leisure and open-air dinners under the stars. The BBQ area sets the stage for relaxed, flavourful moments shared in great company.

The two swimming pools — one for adults and one for children — are true oases of fun and relaxation. While not heated, they benefit from the naturally warm regional climate, often reaching 28ºC during the summer months. The result? A refreshing and invigorating swimming experience, ideal for every summer day.

For those who enjoy staying active, the property features a multi-sport court suitable for tennis, football, or basketball. Right next to it, there is a versatile hall — a multi-purpose space that can host retreats, workshops, family gatherings, or special events, adapting to each guest’s needs and imagination.

Whether you’re looking for total relaxation, quality time with your loved ones, or an inspiring setting for a unique event, Calejo House – Pool & Grill Retreat has everything you need for a memorable stay — where every detail matters, and each day brings a new discovery.

Located in the charming and peaceful parish of Nogueira, in the lush heart of Minho, Calejo House – Pool & Sports & Grill Retreat is a true haven for those who value tranquility, comfort, and authenticity.
Surrounded by abundant nature, it invites you to refreshing walks, moments of contemplation, and absolute relaxation at the gentle pace of rural life.

One of the parish’s highlights is the Church of São Cláudio de Nogueira, a site of great heritage and spiritual significance that bears witness to centuries of history and religious tradition in the region. Its simple yet imposing architecture, set within a picturesque landscape, calls visitors to explore, reflect, and discover the local cultural heritage.

Despite its bucolic surroundings, the property is strategically located just minutes from the historic center of Viana do Castelo, the stunning Atlantic beaches, and a rich cultural and gastronomic offer.
Nearby, you will find Mini Mercado Regueira, which is usually open Monday to Saturday from 9:00 AM to 8:30 PM, and Sundays from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM, offering a convenient option for daily shopping (hours may vary).

Calejo House – Pool & Sports & Grill Retreat is the ideal place for those wishing to escape the hectic pace of everyday life without giving up proximity to everything the region has to offer.

Here, the balance between seclusion and convenience reaches perfect harmony.

Guests have exclusive access to the entire property, including the pool and indoor facilities. Important Note:

During the high season (May to October), the pool is regularly maintained to ensure an impeccable experience for guests. During the low season (November to April), the pool will be closed.

Though nestled in a more secluded setting, Calejo House – Pool & Sports & Grill Retreat is accessible via public transport.
The “Nogueira (Igreja)” bus stop is just a 2-minute walk away and connects to other areas of the municipality, including the centre of Viana do Castelo.
For those travelling by train, Viana do Castelo station is around a 15-minute drive.
However, we recommend arriving by car for greater convenience and freedom during your stay — and to make the most of everything this beautiful region has to offer.

tagline: Modern 3-bedroom house in the heart of Alto Minho, sleeping up to 8. Private heated pool, open year-round. Minutes from the iconic Vodafone Paredes de…
description:
Modern 3-bedroom house in the heart of Alto Minho, sleeping up to 8. Private heated pool, open year-round. Minutes from the iconic Vodafone Paredes de Coura Festival, the Caminho de Santiago, and the protected Corno de Bico landscape. Direct A3 motorway access — Porto in 1 hour. Your base for every season.

Casa da Madorra is a spacious, light-filled modern home set in the green hills of Paredes de Coura, in Portugal's Alto Minho region. Designed for comfort and privacy, it sleeps up to 8 guests across three bedrooms and three bathrooms — ideal for families, groups of friends, or a festival crew looking for a proper home base.
Bedrooms & sleeping

Bedroom 1 — king double bed
Bedroom 2 — king double bed
Bedroom 3 — twin beds (two singles)
3 full bathrooms

The private heated swimming pool is available year-round, covered and protected by an automatic rolling cover. Whether you're visiting in August for the festival or in October for the autumn colours and hiking trails, the pool is ready when you are. Use of the heated pool is available at an additional cost — please enquire at the time of booking.
Inside
The open-plan living and dining area is bright and airy, with a modern kitchen fully equipped for longer stays. Air conditioning throughout. A curated bookshelf, comfortable sofas, and generous natural light make it a home you'll want to return to.

Enjoy the private garden and terrace, with a BBQ for long summer evenings. Private off-road parking for multiple vehicles.

Paredes de Coura is one of Portugal's best-kept secrets — a small, unspoiled town surrounded by ancient forests, river valleys, and protected landscape, in the far north of the Minho region near the Spanish border.
Culture & events
The Vodafone Paredes de Coura Festival, held every August on the banks of the Taboão river, is one of Europe's most beloved independent music festivals — intimate, beautiful, and just 3 km from the house.
Nature & outdoor activities
The house sits on the edge of the Corno de Bico Protected Landscape, one of the most scenic corners of northern Portugal. Hiking, trail running, cycling, and birdwatching trails begin minutes from the front door. The Taboão river beach is a 5-minute drive.
The Caminho de Santiago
The Portuguese Coastal Way (Camino de Santiago) passes nearby, making this a perfect rest stop for pilgrims or those looking to walk a stage of the route.
Nearby towns
Viana do Castelo (35 min), Ponte de Lima (25 min), Monção and the Minho wine country (30 min), and the Spanish city of Vigo (45 min) are all within easy reach.

Guests have exclusive access to the entire property, including the pool, garden, and all indoor amenities. The Portugal Active concierge service is available 24/7 to cater to all your needs, such as organizing local excursions or booking private chef services. Please request any service at least 72 hours in advance. 

Important Notes:
- During your stay, regular garden and pool maintenance may take place. These interventions are important to ensure that all equipment remains clean, functional, and safe to use.
- During the high season (May to October), the pool is maintained regularly to ensure the best experience for our guests.
- In the low season (November to April), the pool remains operational with regular maintenance, guaranteeing comfort and quality throughout the year.
- If you wish to have the pool heated, please notify us at least 5 days in advance.

The house is located just 30 metres from the A3 motorway junction, giving exceptional road access for a rural property:

Porto Francisco Sá Carneiro Airport — 1 hour
Vigo (Spain) — 45 minutes
Viana do Castelo — 35 minutes
Ponte de Lima — 25 minutes
Festival grounds (Vodafone Paredes de Coura) — 5 minutes

A car is recommended to make the most of the region. The nearest supermarkets, restaurants, and cafés are in Paredes de Coura town centre, a 5-minute drive.

description:
Discover the epitome of luxury at Portugal Active Eben Lodge, located in Viana do Castelo—one of Portugal's most sought-after destinations. Nestled in a serene residential area, less than 2 km from the beach and the historic Montedor Lighthouse, our villa offers an unmatched luxury stay with breathtaking ocean views.

Step into an elegantly decorated space, where modern sophistication meets comfort. The villa features a spacious and cozy living room with a fireplace perfect for cooler days. It also boasts 5 spacious suites, each with a private bathroom, ensuring the comfort of up to 10 guests.

Our villa offers a variety of leisure options that will certainly make your stay unforgettable! You can enjoy our indoor pool, which can be heated to approximately 26 degrees, at no additional cost. Additionally, you can engage in lively games on our fabulous pool table. The wooden terrace with a sea view is the perfect spot for sunbathing or admiring the stunning sunset.

Just 15 minutes from the center of Viana do Castelo, our villa is the ideal base to explore the local culture, cuisine, and beautiful landscapes. Its proximity to the main road offers easy access to numerous local attractions, including the Ínsua Fortress, Vila Praia de Âncora—a renowned spot for water sports—and the Santiago paths that skirt the coastline, perfect for nature walks and exploration.

Book your stay and indulge in the ultimate retreat at one of the region's finest villas, where luxury and comfort converge to create an unforgettable experience.

Nestled along the picturesque coastline of Viana do Castelo, the charming village of Carreço offers a serene and inviting atmosphere, perfect for those looking to experience the tranquility of northern Portugal. This quaint neighborhood is known for its stunning natural landscapes, where rolling green hills meet the deep blue of the Atlantic Ocean, creating a breathtaking backdrop for leisurely strolls and outdoor adventures.

As you wander through the peaceful streets of Carreço, you’ll be enchanted by the traditional Portuguese homes, with their red-tiled roofs and whitewashed walls, surrounded by lush gardens and vineyards. The village’s close-knit community adds to the warm and welcoming vibe, making it an ideal spot for those seeking a quiet retreat.

A short walk from the heart of the village will bring you to pristine beaches, such as Praia de Carreço and Praia de Paçô, where you can bask in the sun, explore the rugged coastline, or enjoy water sports like surfing and windsurfing. Nature lovers will also appreciate the nearby Serra de Santa Luzia, offering scenic hiking trails with panoramic views of the region.

For a taste of local culture, visit the charming cafés and family-owned restaurants scattered throughout the village, where you can savor fresh seafood and traditional Portuguese dishes, all made with locally sourced ingredients. Don’t miss the opportunity to visit the historic windmills of Carreço, iconic landmarks that stand as a testament to the area’s rich heritage.

Carreço is conveniently connected to the nearby city of Viana do Castelo by a well-serviced transportation network, allowing easy access to explore the broader region. Whether you’re looking to immerse yourself in nature, relax by the sea, or explore the cultural riches of northern Portugal, Carreço offers a perfect blend of peace, beauty, and tradition.

Our spacious Portugal Active Eben Lodge comfortably accommodates up to 10 people, with 5 bedrooms, each with private bathroom, offering a large and cozy living room, perfect for moments of relaxation and fun, the kitchen is fully equipped and the lodge has a laundry. Also enjoy our indoor swimming pool, which can be heated as an extra service, a games room with a pool table and a vast wooden terrace ideal for gathering friends and family. Furthermore, we provide a private garage for the safety of your vehicles. Come live an exclusive and memorable experience in our luxurious property!

During your stay, regular garden and pool maintenance may take place. These interventions are important to ensure that all equipment remains clean, functional, and safe to use.

name: Quinta with Infinity Pool and Sea Views - Carreço
tagline: Perched on a private hilltop above the Atlantic, Quinta de Cima is an exclusive estate with 7 bedrooms for up to 14 guests, an infinity pool with sea …
description:
Perched on a private hilltop above the Atlantic, Quinta de Cima is an exclusive estate with 7 bedrooms for up to 14 guests, an infinity pool with sea views, an outdoor jacuzzi and a games room with billiards. Just 5 km from Viana do Castelo and minutes from Carreço beach, where slow living meets the permanent sound of the waves.

On a private hilltop in Carreço, close enough to hear the Atlantic waves breaking below, Quinta de Cima unfolds across a vast estate of native woodland and wildflower gardens, exclusively yours from the moment you arrive. Seven bedrooms, six with queen beds and one with two singles, sleep up to 14 guests in a stone farmhouse with warm timber ceilings and a granite kitchen built for long, unhurried meals. Outside, an infinity pool mirrors the open horizon while a jacuzzi for three faces the sea. When evening comes, the games room with billiards and foosball brings everyone together, before the garden claims you back for one of those sunsets that paint the sky in copper and gold.

Carreço is a small coastal parish just 5 kilometres from Viana do Castelo, where the rhythm of rural Minho life plays out against a backdrop of pine forests and open Atlantic water. The village beach, reachable on foot, draws surfers and families throughout the year. Viana do Castelo offers the Basilica of Santa Luzia rising above the rooftops, a vibrant riverside square and some of the finest seafood restaurants in northern Portugal. The surrounding hillsides are laced with walking trails through eucalyptus and pine, while the traditional villages of the Lima valley invite quiet afternoon wandering. In summer, local festivals fill the streets with music and the scent of grilled sardines.

Guests have exclusive access to the entire property, including the swimming pool, the garden and all the indoor facilities. Portugal Active's concierge service is available 24/7 to meet any need, from organizing local tours to booking private chef services. To guarantee availability, please request any service at least 72 hours in advance.

A car is the most comfortable way to explore the coastline, and the quinta has private parking. Viana do Castelo is just 5 km away, with a train station connecting north to Caminha and Valença or south to Braga, Porto and Lisbon. Local buses run regularly between Carreço and the city centre. To explore the coastal strip, from the beaches of Afife and Montedor to the Spanish border at Caminha, the drive takes under half an hour. Porto Francisco Sá Carneiro Airport is approximately 75 km away.

For guests who want to go further, Portugal Active arranges unique experiences across the landscapes of the Minho. Just 3 km from the quinta, horseback riding tours along coastal trails and through pine forests let you discover the region at the most natural pace imaginable. For those drawn to the water, stand-up paddle sessions on the Lima River or guided hikes through the northern hills round out a truly unforgettable stay.
